sections.heading: Education
items: Ph.D. in Communication, Annenberg School for Communication, University of Pennsylvania, USA (2010)
Certificate of Study in Law, Penn Law School, University of Pennsylvania, USA (2008)
Certificate in Comparative Media Law & Policy, University of Oxford, UK (2004)
M.A. in China Studies, University of Leiden, Netherlands (2001)
B.A. in China Studies, University of Leiden, Netherlands (2001)

sections.heading: Language
sections.content:
Fluent in English, Dutch, Cantonese and Mandarin Chinese.
Moderately fluent in German and French.
Reading knowledge of Latin, Classical Greek and Classical Chinese.

sections.heading: Employment
items: Assistant Professor, The Graduate Institute of Journalism, National Taiwan University (2026–present)
Research Fellow, The Citizen Lab, The Munk School of Global Affairs, University of Toronto (2019–2026)
Assistant Professor, School of Journalism and Communication, Chinese University of Hong Kong (2014–2021)
Acting Public Policy Manager for Greater China (maternity cover), Twitter (2020)
Head of Free Expression in Asia and the Pacific, Google (2010–2014)
Assistant Professor, Department of Media and Communication, City University of Hong Kong (2010–2011)

sections.heading: Service (Selected)
items: Reviewer for academic journals, including China Information, China Aktuell, Journalism: Theory, Practice & Criticism, Chinese Journal of Communication, Social Media and Society, International Journal for Communication, Journal for Information Technology and Policy, China Perspectives, Global Media and Communication, etc.

Reviewer of various fellowships and grants, including the Mozilla Foundation Fellowships (2019), the Global Voices Advocacy Awards (2015), the Rising Voices Citizen Media Grant (2011), and the Knight Foundation News Challenge (2010)
Chinese University of Hong Kong: participated in various committees and panels, including the Faculty Board of Social Science, and the Graduate and Undergraduate panel at the School of Journalism
Journalism: Theory, Practice, and Criticism: Editorial Board Member (2017–present)
Global Voices: Board Member (2023–2028)
Digital Asia Hub: Steering Committee Member (2016–present)
Internet Policy Observatory, The University of Pennsylvania: Board Member (2016–2017)
